APPROVE
Implementation cleanly short-circuits ResolveRoute for the two explicit strategies, preserves the configured candidate list, falls back to provider default model when an entry omits Model, and leaves smart/"" routing untouched. The added cooldown-demotion behavior reorders but never drops candidates, which is consistent with the bead's "list is preserved" contract and the existing RecordRouteAttempt demotion semantics. artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T073701-fadecd1f/reviewer-stream.log

success
Implementation cleanly short-circuits ResolveRoute for the two explicit strategies, preserves the configured candidate list, falls back to provider default model when an entry omits Model, and leaves smart/"" routing untouched. The added cooldown-demotion behavior reorders but never drops candidates, which is consistent with the bead's "list is preserved" contract and the existing RecordRouteAttempt demotion semantics. Tests cover both strategies, ordering, default-model fallthrough, and the smart-strategy negative case.
